questions.question: The volcano ---- dormant for over three centuries before it ---- unexpectedly last spring, forcing thousands of residents to evacuate.
options: D) had been lying / was erupting

feedback.hint: 'Three centuries before it erupted' → referans noktasından önce süren uzun süreç. Patlama anlık mı, süregelen mi?
feedback.logic: 'For over three centuries before' → uzun süregelen eylem, referans noktasından önce → Past Perfect Continuous: 'had been lying'. Patlama tek anlık olay → Simple Past: 'erupted'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'lay / had erupted' diyerek zamanları tersine çevirir; 'had erupted' patlama referans noktasından önce olmuş olur — ama hikâye tam tersi.

questions.question: By the time the rescue helicopter ---- the crash site, the survivors ---- a makeshift shelter and ---- for nearly ten hours.
options: A) reached / had built / had been waiting
C) reaches / have built / have been waiting
E) had reached / had built / had been waiting

feedback.hint: 'By the time + geçmiş' → iki tamamlanmış geçmiş eylem. Biri anlık (inşaat), biri süreç (bekleme).
feedback.logic: 'By the time + reached' (referans) → sığınak inşası önceden tamamlandı → Past Perfect: 'had built'. Bekleme süreci devam etmişti → Past Perfect Continuous: 'had been waiting'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'were building' diyerek inşaatı süregelen eylem yapar; 'by the time' noktasında inşaat tamamlanmıştı — Past Perfect gerekli.

questions.question: Online content creators ---- increasingly sophisticated editing software ever since short-form video ---- the dominant format on major platforms.

feedback.hint: 'Ever since + geçmiş' → başlangıç noktası ve süregelen süreç.
feedback.logic: 'Ever since... became' → başlangıç noktası Simple Past. Bu noktadan bugüne süren benimseme eğilimi → Present Perfect Continuous: 'have been adopting'.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'are adopting / became' der; 'are adopting' şu an devam ediyor ama 'ever since' başlangıç noktasıyla bağlantıyı keser — Present Perfect Continuous 'since'i tamamlar.

questions.question: The foundation ---- its annual youth arts competition since 2008 and ---- its prize money three times in response to growing demand.
options: A) has been running / has increased

feedback.hint: 'Since 2008' → iki farklı Present Perfect yapısı. Biri süreç, diğeri sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'Since 2008' + devam eden organizasyon → Present Perfect Continuous: 'has been running'. Ödülü üç kez artırmak → tamamlanmış sonuç → Present Perfect: 'has increased'.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'increased' diyerek Simple Past kullanır; ödül artışı günümüze kadar gerçekleşmiş birikimli bir eylemdir — 'has increased' gerekli.

questions.question: I ---- about contacting my estranged friend for months, and by next week, it ---- two years since we last spoke.
options: A) have been thinking / will have been
D) have thought / will have been

feedback.hint: 'For months' → süreç. 'By next week + two years since' → gelecekte tamamlanmış süre.
feedback.logic: 'For months' + şimdiye uzanan düşünce süreci → Present Perfect Continuous: 'have been thinking'. 'By next week + two years since' → Future Perfect: 'will have been'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'am thinking / will be' der; 'for months' süreç zarfı Present Continuous'u değil Perfect Continuous'u gerektirir.

questions.question: The graffiti artist ---- the entire wall when the property owner suddenly ---- and demanded she stop immediately.

feedback.hint: Boyama devam ederken mülk sahibi aniden çıkageldi → arka plan + noktasal kesinti.
feedback.logic: Süregelen arka plan → Past Continuous: 'was painting'. İçine giren ani olay → Simple Past: 'appeared'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'had painted' diyerek boyamayı tamamlanmış gösterir; mülk sahibi geldiğinde boyama hâlâ sürmekteydi — Past Continuous gerekli.

questions.question: Archaeologists believe that the site ---- continuously for at least five hundred years before it ---- for reasons that remain unclear.
options: A) had been inhabited / was abandoned
B) was inhabited / had been abandoned
C) has been inhabited / was abandoned
D) had been inhabited / has been abandoned

feedback.hint: 'For at least five hundred years before it was abandoned' → terk edilmeden önce süregelen iskan.
feedback.logic: Terk etme referans noktası Simple Past. Bundan önce beş yüz yıl süregelen iskan → Past Perfect Continuous: 'had been inhabited'. Terk etme → Simple Past Passive: 'was abandoned'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'was inhabited / had been abandoned' diyerek zamanları tersine çevirir; insan yerleşimi terk etmeden önceydi, 'had been abandoned' önceden terk edildi anlamı verir.

questions.question: I ---- the same playlist every morning this week; somehow it ---- to set the perfect tone for a productive day.

feedback.hint: 'This week' + tekrar eden alışkanlık. 'Seems' → stative verb, süreklilik kipine girmez.
feedback.logic: 'This week' + tekrar eden eylem → Present Perfect Continuous: 'have been playing'. 'Seems' → stative verb → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'is seeming' diyerek stative verb 'seem'i Continuous kipinde kullanır — stative verbler Continuous kipiyle kullanılmaz.

questions.question: By the end of this school year, our biology teacher ---- every chapter in the curriculum, and we ---- a full mock examination.
options: A) will have covered / will have completed
C) will have been covering / will complete
E) will have covered / will complete

feedback.hint: 'By the end of this school year' → iki eylem de o noktaya kadar tamamlanmış olacak.
feedback.logic: 'By the end of this school year' → Future Perfect: 'will have covered'. Sınav da aynı noktaya kadar tamamlanmış → Future Perfect: 'will have completed'.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'will have covered / will complete' diyerek sınavı Simple Future yapar; 'by the end' her iki eylemi de Future Perfect'e bağlar.

questions.question: Just as the judge ---- her final remarks, a piece of evidence ---- that cast serious doubt on the prosecution's central argument.

feedback.hint: 'Just as' → arka plan süregelen eylem + içine giren anlık olay.
feedback.logic: 'Just as she was delivering' → arka plan devam eden eylem → Past Continuous. Kanıtın ortaya çıkması ani olay → Simple Past: 'emerged'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'had emerged' diyerek kanıtı o andan önce ortaya çıkmış gösterir; 'just as' eş zamanlılık işaret eder — Simple Past gerekli.

questions.question: The instructions specify that all participants ---- their forms in black ink only; submissions in other colours ---- for processing.
options: A) must complete / will not be accepted
B) should complete / are not accepted
C) are to complete / cannot be accepted
D) must complete / may not be accepted
E) have to complete / will not accept

feedback.hint: Resmi talimat → kesin zorunluluk. Reddedilme koşulu → kesin ve sürekli politika.
feedback.logic: 'Must complete' = kesin talimat zorunluluğu. 'Will not be accepted' = kesin politika bildirimi (Simple Future Passive ile kural aktarımı).
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'may not be accepted' diyerek olasılık içerir; ancak kural kesin — 'may not' belirsizlik yaratır, 'will not' kesin ret bildirir.

questions.question: The error in the published report ---- a simple typo; however, it ---- enormous reputational damage to the research team.
options: A) may have been / could have caused
B) must have been / will cause
D) might have been / has caused
E) may have been / must have caused

feedback.hint: Hatanın kaynağı belirsiz → zayıf geçmiş olasılık. Olası sonuç → gerçekleşmemiş geçmiş ihtimal.
feedback.logic: 'May have been' = zayıf geçmiş olasılık (belki yazım hatasıydı). 'Could have caused' = gerçekleşmedi ama zarar verebilirdi — geçmiş gerçekleşmemiş olasılık.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'must have caused' diyerek güçlü geçmiş çıkarım kullanır; ancak 'however' zıtlığı gerçekte zarar verilmediğini ima ediyor — 'could have caused' (potansiyel) daha uygun.

questions.question: You ---- the entire book in one sitting; taking regular breaks ---- you to retain the information more effectively.
options: C) don't have to read / allows

feedback.hint: 'Needn't' = zorunluluk yok. İkinci boşluk: genel gerçek mi, öneri mi?
feedback.logic: 'Needn't read' = okumak zorunda değilsin (zorunluluk yok). 'Taking breaks allows' = genel gerçek bilimsel öneri → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'would allow' diyerek koşullu kullanım yapar; 'taking breaks allows' genel bilimsel gerçektir — 'would' hipotetik koşul içerir, burada gereksiz.

questions.question: The actor ---- his lines perfectly during rehearsal; the director ---- only minor adjustments before the opening night.
options: A) had memorised / needed to make
D) has memorised / needed to make

feedback.hint: Prova öncesinde ezber tamamlanmıştı. Yönetmenin ayarlamaları gerekiyordu → zorunluluk.
feedback.logic: Prova başlamadan önce ezber tamamlandı → Past Perfect: 'had memorised'. Küçük düzeltme zorunluluğu vardı → 'needed to make' (geçmiş zorunluluk).
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'must have made' diyerek kanıta dayalı geçmiş çıkarım kullanır; yönetmenin ayarlama ihtiyacı bilinen bir durum, çıkarım değil — 'needed to make' daha doğru.

questions.question: Given the sensitive nature of the data, researchers ---- share it externally without written consent from participants, ---- clear ethical protocols.
options: B) do not have to / thereby violating
D) are not supposed to / violating

feedback.hint: Etik kural → kesin yasak. 'Thereby + gerund' → yasağın ihlali durumunda gerçekleşecek sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'Must not share' = kesin etik yasak. 'Thereby violating' = paylaşılması durumunda eş zamanlı olarak ihlal gerçekleşir — sonuç bildiren participial phrase.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'do not have to' diyerek zorunluluk yok anlamı verir; paylaşım yasak, 'have to' yok değil 'must not' gerekli.

questions.question: The stadium lights went off mid-match; there ---- a power outage, or someone ---- an error in the scheduling system.
options: A) must have been / may have made
C) should have been / could make
D) must have been / must have made

feedback.hint: İki ayrı geçmiş olasılık. Birincisi güçlü çıkarım, ikincisi daha zayıf alternatif açıklama.
feedback.logic: 'Must have been' = güçlü geçmiş çıkarım (enerji kesintisi en olası açıklama). 'May have made' = daha zayıf alternatif olasılık (birisi hata yapmış olabilir).
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı her ikisine de 'must have' koyar; iki güçlü çıkarım birbirinin alternatifi olamaz — 'may have made' daha zayıf ikinci açıklamayı ifade eder.

questions.question: Young athletes ---- the long-term consequences of overtraining early in their careers; many ---- irreversible joint damage as a result.
options: A) are often warned about / have sustained
C) are often warned about / sustain
E) are often warned about / had sustained

feedback.hint: Pasif yapı: 'uyarılıyorlar'. Sonuç: hasarın birikimsel boyutu.
feedback.logic: 'Are often warned about' = Simple Present Passive (düzenli olarak uyarılıyorlar). 'Have sustained irreversible damage' = geçmişten bugüne biriken sonuç → Present Perfect.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'sustain' diyerek Simple Present kullanır; hasar zaten gerçekleşmiş ve birikmiştir — Present Perfect 'have sustained' daha güçlü.

questions.question: She ---- more carefully about the implications before posting publicly; the backlash ---- swift and unforgiving.
options: B) must have thought / has been
D) should have thought / had been

feedback.hint: Kamuoyu tepkisi geri dönülemez biçimde gerçekleşti → geçmiş pişmanlık. Tepkinin niteliği.
feedback.logic: 'Should have thought' = geçmişte yapılması gereken ama yapılmamış eylem (pişmanlık). 'The backlash was' = geçmişte gerçekleşmiş ve tamamlanmış → Simple Past.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'had been' diyerek Past Perfect kullanır; backlash ne referans noktasından önce ne de sonra — eş zamanlı gerçekleşen geçmiş → Simple Past yeterli.

questions.question: Applicants ---- demonstrate proficiency in at least two languages; ---- they are encouraged to list any additional language skills they possess.

feedback.hint: Resmi başvuru şartı. 'Encouraged to list additional skills' → bu ek bir teşviktir, zıtlık değil.
feedback.logic: 'Are required to' = resmi koşul. 'Moreover' = ek bilgi bildirme (üstelik, buna ek olarak) — ek teşvik, zıtlık değil.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'however' diyerek zıtlık bildirir; ek dil becerilerini listelemek teşviki zorunluluğun karşısında değil, onu tamamlayan bir bilgi — 'moreover' ek bilgiyi doğru kurar.

questions.question: The final decision ---- have been made without consulting the affected communities; such an oversight ---- undermine trust in the entire initiative.
options: D) ought not to have / may

feedback.hint: Karar alınmadan önce danışılması gerekiyordu ama danışılmadı → geçmişe eleştiri. Sonuç: güven zedelenme riski.
feedback.logic: 'Ought not to have been made' = geçmişte yapılmaması gereken ama yapılan eleştiri. 'May undermine' = olası risk — kesin değil.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'should not' diyerek basit şimdiki tavsiye verir; geçmişte yapılan bir karar eleştiriliyor — perfect modal 'ought not to have' gerekli.

questions.question: The teenager's short film ---- in over thirty international competitions and ---- the jury prize at two of them.
options: A) has been entered / has won
E) has been entered / had won

feedback.hint: Her ikisi de geçmişten bugüne uzanan başarı hikâyesi. Belirli zaman zarfı var mı?
feedback.logic: Belirli zaman yok + günümüze uzanan başarı → Present Perfect Passive: 'has been entered'. Ödül kazanımı da aynı dönem → Present Perfect: 'has won'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'was entered / has won' diyerek zamanları karıştırır; her ikisi de Present Perfect ile paralel olmalı — belirli bir geçmiş zaman verilmemiş.

questions.question: The bridge ---- for five years before structural flaws ---- that required immediate reinforcement.
options: A) had been in use / were detected
B) was in use / have been detected
C) has been in use / were detected
D) had been in use / had been detected
E) was in use / were detected

feedback.hint: 'For five years before structural flaws were detected' → iki geçmiş eylem kronolojisi.
feedback.logic: Kullanım referans noktasından önce başladı ve sürdü → Past Perfect: 'had been in use'. Yapısal kusurların tespiti referans noktası → Simple Past Passive: 'were detected'.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'was in use / were detected' diyerek her ikisini de Simple Past yapar; köprünün kullanımı tespittten önce başlamıştı — Past Perfect gerekli.

questions.question: The algorithm ---- currently ---- to filter out hate speech more effectively, and the results ---- promising so far.
options: A) is / being updated / have proved
B) has / been updated / are proving
C) is / being updated / are proving
D) was / being updated / have proved

feedback.hint: 'Currently' → devam eden pasif. 'So far' → bugüne kadar birikimli sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'Currently being updated' → Present Continuous Passive. 'Have proved promising so far' → Present Perfect (bugüne kadar elde edilen sonuç).
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'are proving' diyerek Simple Present Continuous kullanır; 'so far' birikimsel sonucu işaret eder → Present Perfect 'have proved' daha uygun.

questions.question: It ---- increasingly ---- that regular exposure to nature ---- stress levels and cognitive fatigue in urban adolescents.

feedback.hint: 'It is recognised that' → impersonal passive. Ardından gelen genel gerçek cümlesi ne zaman?
feedback.logic: 'It is increasingly recognised that' = impersonal passive, genel kabul. 'Reduces stress' = genel bilimsel gerçek → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'is being recognised' diyerek süregelen tanınmayı işaret eder; 'increasingly recognised' kalıcı artış gösteren genel kabul — Simple Present Passive daha uygun.

questions.question: The famous mural ---- over with grey paint by vandals last night, but a local restoration team ---- to repair it before the weekend.
options: D) had been covered / is expected
E) was covered / has been expected

feedback.hint: 'Last night' → geçmiş. Restorasyon beklentisi → şimdiki gelecek plan.
feedback.logic: 'Last night' → Simple Past Passive: 'was covered'. 'Is expected to repair' = şimdiki beklenti/plan → Simple Present Passive.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'was expected' diyerek beklentiyi de geçmişe çeker; restorasyon şu an planlanıyor, geçmişte değil — 'is expected' gerekli.

questions.question: The documentary series, ---- entirely by student filmmakers, ---- a prestigious broadcasting award last month.
options: E) that was produced / was given

feedback.hint: Virgüllü non-defining participial phrase. 'Last month' → geçmiş.
feedback.logic: 'Produced entirely by student filmmakers' → past participial phrase (reduced passive relative clause). 'Last month' → Simple Past Passive: 'was given'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'has been given' diyerek Present Perfect kullanır; 'last month' belirli geçmiş zaman → Simple Past Passive gerekli.

questions.question: The controversial decision ---- by the committee before any of the affected students ---- an opportunity to voice their concerns.
options: A) had been reached / were given
B) was reached / had been given
C) had been reached / had been given

feedback.hint: 'Before any students were given an opportunity' → karar fırsat verilmeden önce alındı.
feedback.logic: Karar → öğrencilere söz verilmeden önce alındı → Past Perfect Passive: 'had been reached'. Öğrencilere söz hakkı → referans noktası → Simple Past Passive: 'were given'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'was reached / had been given' diyerek zamanları tersine çevirir; karar söz hakkından önce alınmıştı — Past Perfect ilk eyleme ait.

questions.question: By the time the policy review is complete, the proposals ---- and new guidelines ---- to all staff.
options: A) will have been evaluated / will have been circulated
B) will be evaluated / will circulate
C) are evaluated / will have been circulated
D) will have been evaluated / will be circulated
E) have been evaluated / will have been circulated

feedback.hint: 'By the time + Simple Present' → gelecek referans noktası. İlk eylem tamamlanmış, ikincisi basit gelecek mi?
feedback.logic: 'By the time + is complete' → Future Perfect Passive: 'will have been evaluated'. Kılavuzların dolaşıma girmesi → aynı noktaya bağlı ama basit gelecek plan da mümkün → 'will be circulated'.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı her ikisini de Future Perfect Passive yapar; kılavuzların gönderimi ayrı bir gelecek eylemdir, by-the-time noktasına kadar tamamlanmış olmak zorunda değil — 'will be circulated' daha doğal.

questions.question: The app ---- downloaded over five million times this month alone, a figure that ---- by the development team as extraordinarily encouraging.
options: A) has been / has been described
D) is being / has been described

feedback.hint: 'This month alone' → geçmişten bugüne. Ekibin değerlendirmesi de aynı döneme ait.
feedback.logic: 'This month alone' → Present Perfect Passive: 'has been downloaded'. Ekibin yorumu da aynı dönem → Present Perfect Passive: 'has been described'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'has been / was described' diyerek ikinci boşluğu Simple Past yapar; her iki eylem de 'this month' çerçevesinde — Present Perfect paraleli gerekli.

questions.question: The script ---- on the playwright's own adolescent experiences, and the central character ---- to embody the confusion of that transitional period.

feedback.hint: Oyun hâlâ var ve her iki özellik de şimdiki gerçektir. Stative passive yapı.
feedback.logic: 'Is based on' = stative passive (gerçek/sürekli durum). 'Is intended to embody' = amaç passive — her ikisi de Simple Present Passive.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı her ikisini de Simple Past yapar; oyun hâlâ var ve özellikleri değişmedi — stative passive Present gerektirir.

questions.question: She wishes the college application system ---- more transparent; students ---- so anxious about requirements they barely understand.
options: C) had been / would not have felt
D) would be / do not feel

feedback.hint: 'I wish' + mevcut sisteme pişmanlık. Sonuç şimdiki/gelecek koşullu.
feedback.logic: 'Wish' + mevcut duruma pişmanlık → Simple Past Subjunctive: 'were'. Koşullu sonuç → Type 2: 'would not feel'.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'did not feel' diyerek Simple Past kullanır; Type 2 sonuç için 'would + base form' gerekli — 'did not feel' Simple Past Subjunctive sonuç için yanlış.

questions.question: ---- the researchers ---- to publish their findings prematurely, they ---- the integrity of the entire study.
options: A) Were / to choose / would compromise
C) Had / chosen / would have compromised
D) Were / to choose / would have compromised
E) Should / have chosen / would compromise

feedback.hint: 'Were + subject + to + infinitive' → hangi conditional type? Sonuç koşullu gelecek mi, geçmiş mi?
feedback.logic: 'Were to choose' = formal hypothetical present/future (Type 2 inversion). Sonuç → 'would compromise' = Type 2.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'would have compromised' diyerek Type 3 sonuç verir; 'were to choose' gelecek hipotetik (Type 2) olduğundan sonuç da Type 2 olmalı.

questions.question: If online learning platforms ---- better designed for social interaction, remote education ---- as isolating as critics claim it is today.
options: B) had been / would not have been
D) were / would not have been
E) had been / would not be

feedback.hint: 'As critics claim it is today' → şimdiki durum. Platformlar hâlâ iyi tasarlanmamış → mevcut gerçekliğe karşı hipotez.
feedback.logic: Mevcut gerçekliğe karşı hipotez → Type 2: 'were / would not be'. 'As critics claim today' şimdiki koşullu sonucu destekler.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'had been / would not be' diyerek Mixed Conditional kurar; ancak bağlam tamamen şimdiki durumu eleştiriyor — Type 2 (şimdiki hipotez) gerekli.

questions.question: If only the city ---- more investment in public libraries years ago; teenagers ---- access to far greater resources now.
options: C) had attracted / would have had

feedback.hint: 'Years ago' → geçmiş pişmanlık. 'Now' → şimdiki etki. Mixed mi, Type 3 mü?
feedback.logic: 'If only' + geçmiş pişmanlık → Past Perfect: 'had attracted'. 'Now' → şimdiki etki → Mixed Conditional: 'would have (access)' = 'would have access'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'would have had' diyerek Type 3 sonuç verir; 'now' şimdiki anı işaret eder → Mixed Conditional, 'would have' şimdiki sonuç.

questions.question: I wish she ---- so harshly about her own work; her constant self-criticism ---- her creative confidence.
options: C) hadn't spoken / would have eroded

feedback.hint: 'I wish + wouldn't' → iradeye bağlı isteksiz tekrar eden davranış. Sonuç şimdiki süreci.
feedback.logic: 'I wish she wouldn't + speak' = tekrar eden isteksiz davranışa pişmanlık (seçimli/iradeli). 'Is eroding' = şimdiki devam eden sonuç → Present Continuous.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'didn't speak / erodes' diyerek 'wish + Simple Past + Simple Present' kurar; iradeli tekrar eden davranış için 'wish + wouldn't' standart — 'didn't speak' genel durum/hal pişmanlığıdır.

questions.question: Assuming the funding ---- approved next month, the project ---- ready for launch within the following six months.

feedback.hint: 'Assuming + ...' → gerçek koşul bağlamı. 'Next month' → geleceğe yönelik plan.
feedback.logic: 'Assuming + Simple Present' = gerçek koşul bağlacı (Type 1). Gerçek gelecek sonuç → 'will be'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'were / would be' diyerek Type 2 kurar; 'assuming' + gelecek plan bağlamı gerçek koşul → Type 1 gerekli.

questions.question: Had the environmental impact assessment ---- more rigorously, the construction permit ---- in the first place.
options: A) been conducted / would never have been issued
B) been conducted / would never be issued
C) conducted / would never have been issued
D) been conducting / would not be issued
E) been conducted / had never been issued

feedback.hint: Inversion yapısı: 'Had + subject + been + past participle'. Sonuç geçmiş gerçekleşmemiş eylem.
feedback.logic: 'Had the assessment been conducted' = 'If the assessment had been conducted' (Past Perfect Passive inverted). Sonuç → Type 3: 'would never have been issued'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'would never be issued' diyerek şimdiki sonuç verir; inverted Type 3 geçmiş gerçekleşmemiş sonucu gerektirir — 'would have been issued'.

questions.question: It's time the tech industry ---- personal data as a product to be exploited rather than ---- it as a responsibility to be protected.

feedback.hint: 'It's time + ...' → Simple Past subjunctive. 'Rather than + ...' → paralel gerund yapısı.
feedback.logic: 'It's time + Simple Past subjunctive': 'stopped treating'. 'Rather than + gerund': 'treating' — paralel eylem.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'stopped treating / to treat' diyerek 'rather than' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'rather than' edat olarak gerund gerektirir — 'treating' doğru.

questions.question: If the documentary ---- more widely screened, public awareness of food waste ---- significantly in the weeks following its release.
options: A) had been / would have increased
E) has been / will have increased

feedback.hint: 'Screened' → pasif. Geçmişte geniş dağıtım yapılmadı. Sonuç da geçmişte gerçekleşmedi.
feedback.logic: Geçmişte yapılmamış eylem → Past Perfect Passive: 'had been'. Gerçekleşmemiş geçmiş sonuç → Type 3: 'would have increased'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'had been / would increase' diyerek Mixed Conditional kurar; ancak 'in the weeks following its release' geçmiş zaman bağlamı — Type 3 sonuç gerekli.

questions.question: Provided that both parties ---- to the revised terms before Friday, the agreement ---- into effect at the start of next month.

feedback.hint: 'Provided that' + gerçek koşul. 'At the start of next month' → gelecek.
feedback.logic: 'Provided that + Simple Present' = Type 1 gerçek koşul: 'agree'. Gerçek gelecek sonuç: 'will come'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'agree / comes' diyerek Simple Present sonucu verir; anlaşma gelecekte yürürlüğe girer — 'will come' gelecek zamanı doğru aktarır.

questions.question: The youth panel demanded that the school administration ---- their petition seriously and ---- an urgent meeting to discuss the proposed curriculum changes.

feedback.hint: 'Demanded that' → subjunctive. Paralel yapı gerekiyor.
feedback.logic: 'Demand that + subjunctive (base form)': 'take / convene'. Her iki eylem de paralel base form.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'took / convened' diyerek Simple Past kullanır; 'demand that' subjunctive base form gerektirir — 'took/convened' backshift değil, subjunctive bağlamı.

questions.question: The study's authors acknowledged ---- their methodology had several limitations and ---- future research would be needed to corroborate their findings.

feedback.hint: İki olgusal itiraf: metodolojik sınırlamalar + gelecek araştırma ihtiyacı. Her ikisi de nasıl bağlanıyor?
feedback.logic: 'Acknowledged that X... and that Y' → iki paralel olgusal noun clause, 'that' bağlacı.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'that / whether' diyerek ikinci noun clause'u evet/hayır sorusuna dönüştürür; ancak 'future research would be needed' olgu bildirimi — 'that' gerekli.

questions.question: The documentary raises the question of ---- social media companies ---- legally responsible for the mental health consequences of their platform designs.

feedback.hint: 'The question of + ...' → evet/hayır sorusu mu, yoksa olgusal mı? Modal bağlamı ne?
feedback.logic: 'The question of whether' = evet/hayır sorusu noun clause. 'Should be held responsible' = pasif modal (yasal sorumluluk tartışması).
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'if / are held' diyerek 'if' kullanır; 'the question of if' dilbilgisel ama standart değil — 'the question of whether' kalıp ifadedir.

questions.question: The professor informed the students ---- the deadline ---- extended by one week and ---- late submissions ---- no longer be penalised.
options: A) that / had been / that / would
C) whether / had been / whether / would
D) that / had been / and / will

feedback.hint: 'Informed that' → backshift. İki paralel bildirim. Hangi bağlaç ikinci cümleyi açıyor?
feedback.logic: 'Informed that... had been extended' (backshift: was → had been) 'and that... would not be penalised' (backshift: will → would). Her iki noun clause da 'that' ile.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'and / will' diyerek ikinci bölümü backshift yapmadan bırakır; 'informed' (reporting verb) her iki bölümü de backshift'e tabi kılar.

questions.question: It is often ---- that children who grow up ---- a second language from infancy develop greater metalinguistic awareness than those who do not.
options: E) argued / to be exposed to

feedback.hint: 'It is argued that' → impersonal passive. 'Who grow up exposed to' → participial yapı.
feedback.logic: 'It is often argued that' = impersonal passive. 'Children exposed to a second language from infancy' → 'exposed to' participial (reduced passive relative).
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'exposing to' diyerek aktif participial kullanır; çocuklar dil maruziyetini alan taraftır — passive participial 'exposed to' gerekli.

questions.question: Many young readers find it hard to comprehend ---- experienced authors manage to sustain narrative tension across hundreds of pages without ---- the plot.

feedback.hint: 'Hard to comprehend' → anlaşılması güç şey. 'Manage to sustain tension' → biçim sorusu. 'Without + ...'.
feedback.logic: 'Comprehend how they manage' = biçim/yöntem sorusu → 'how'. 'Without + gerund': 'overcomplicating'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'how / to overcomplicate' diyerek 'without' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'without' edat olarak gerund alır — 'overcomplicating' gerekli.

questions.question: The coach warned her players ---- they ---- conserve energy in the first half and ---- to ignore the crowd noise.

feedback.hint: 'Warned that' → noun clause. 'Should + base form'. 'Try' → infinitive mi, base form mu?
feedback.logic: 'Warned that they should conserve' → noun clause + modal. 'And try' paralel? Aslında 'warned them to try' yapısı da var; ancak 'that... and to try' → noun clause içinde 'and to try' = infinitive complement.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'try' diyerek base form kullanır; 'and try' yerine 'and to try' = paralel infinitive bağlantısı 'and' + infinitive marker gerektirir burada.

questions.question: ---- strikes most readers about the novel is not the plot itself but ---- the author manages to make even minor characters feel fully alive.

feedback.hint: İlk boşluk: özne noun clause. İkinci boşluk: 'feel alive' nasıl başarıldığı → biçim sorusu.
feedback.logic: 'What strikes readers' = 'the thing that strikes' → subject noun clause. 'How the author manages' = manner noun clause (nasıl başardığı).
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'the way' diyerek noun clause yerine isim kullanır; 'the way the author manages' dilbilgisel doğru ama 'how' daha akademik ve tercih edilen.

questions.question: The panel recommended ---- the age restriction ---- lowered to sixteen for municipal elections and ---- civic education ---- made compulsory.

feedback.hint: 'Recommended that' → subjunctive. İki paralel öneri. İkinci öneri de 'that' ile başlamalı mı?
feedback.logic: 'Recommend that + subjunctive': 'be lowered / be made'. Her iki öneri de paralel subjunctive. İkinci 'that' tekrarı paralel noun clause yapısı için doğal.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'that / be / and / be' diyerek ikinci 'that' düşürür; formal yazıda paralel noun clause'larda 'that' tekrarı tutarlılık sağlar — ikinci 'that' gerekli.

questions.question: The documentary filmmaker was curious about ---- the teens she interviewed felt their online identities ---- them authentically.

feedback.hint: 'Curious about whether' → evet/hayır dolaylı sorusu. 'She interviewed' (geçmiş) → kimlikler onları temsil ediyor muydu?
feedback.logic: 'Curious about whether' = evet/hayır sorusu. 'Felt... represented them' → backshift: 'represent' → 'represented'.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'how / represented' diyerek biçim sorusu kurar; araştırmacı kimliğin var olup olmadığını merak ediyor, nasıl temsil edildiğini değil — 'whether' uygun.

questions.question: The young entrepreneur risks ---- everything she has built over the past three years by ---- to pivot her business model in a volatile market.

feedback.hint: 'Risk' hangi yapıyı alıyor? 'By + ...' hangi yapıyı alıyor?
feedback.logic: 'Risk + gerund': 'losing'. 'By + gerund': 'attempting' — edat tamlaması.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'losing / to attempt' diyerek 'by' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'by' edat olarak gerund alır — 'attempting' gerekli.

questions.question: The nutritionist advised her client ---- processed foods from her diet gradually rather than ---- them all at once.
options: C) to eliminate / to cut out

feedback.hint: 'Advise + object + ...' yapısı. 'Rather than + ...' → gerund.
feedback.logic: 'Advise + object + infinitive': 'to eliminate'. 'Rather than + gerund': 'cutting out'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'to eliminate / to cut out' diyerek 'rather than' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'rather than' edat olarak gerund alır — 'cutting out' gerekli.

questions.question: He ended up ---- the internship offer he had once dismissed, ---- that practical experience outweighs idealism in competitive industries.

feedback.hint: 'End up + ...' yapısı. İkinci boşluk: eş zamanlı farkındalık — participial phrase.
feedback.logic: 'End up + gerund': 'accepting'. 'Realising that...' → eş zamanlı farkındalık participial phrase.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'accepting / to realise' diyerek 'to realise' infinitive kullanır; 'realising' participial phrase eş zamanlılığı bildirir — 'to realise' amaç ifade eder.

questions.question: The school's wellness programme aims ---- the stigma associated with mental health by ---- open dialogue among students and staff.

feedback.hint: 'Aim + ...' yapısı. 'By + ...' → edat tamlaması.
feedback.logic: 'Aim + infinitive': 'to reduce'. 'By + gerund': 'fostering'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'to reduce / to foster' diyerek 'by' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'by' edat olarak gerund alır — 'fostering' gerekli.

questions.question: Most teenagers find ---- to a fixed reading schedule challenging, yet those who persist report ---- more deeply engaged with the stories they read.

feedback.hint: 'Find + ...' yapısı (object + adj bağlamı değil, doğrudan gerund). 'Report + ...' yapısı.
feedback.logic: 'Find + gerund + challenging': 'sticking'. 'Report + gerund': 'feeling'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'to stick / feeling' diyerek 'find' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'find + gerund + adjective' standart yapı — 'to stick' yanlış.

questions.question: The band postponed ---- their new album until the sound engineering ---- improved to the standard they envisioned.

feedback.hint: 'Postpone + ...' yapısı. 'Until + ...' → hangi tense? Ses mühendisliği ne zaman iyileşmişti?
feedback.logic: 'Postpone + gerund': 'releasing'. 'Until the sound engineering had been improved' → ses mühendisliği yayından önce tamamlanmıştı → Past Perfect Passive.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'releasing / was' diyerek Simple Past kullanır; iyileştirme yayından önce tamamlanmıştı — Past Perfect kronolojik önceliği gerektirir.

questions.question: She appears ---- deeply moved by the standing ovation, ---- back tears as she stepped forward to accept the award.
options: D) to have been / to hold

feedback.hint: 'Appear + infinitive'. Duygulanma ödülden önce mi, o an mı? 'Holding back tears' → eş zamanlı.
feedback.logic: 'Appears to have been moved' → perfect infinitive (duygulanma o anı öncesinde/eş zamanlı olarak tamamlanmış). 'Holding back tears' → eş zamanlı participial.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'to be / holding' diyerek basit infinitive kullanır; ödülü almaya adım atarken duygulanma hâlihazırda gerçekleşmişti — perfect infinitive daha güçlü.

questions.question: It would be counterproductive ---- strict screen-time limits on teenagers without first ---- them understand why those limits serve their well-being.

feedback.hint: 'It would be + adj + ...' yapısı. 'Without + ...' → edat tamlaması.
feedback.logic: 'It would be counterproductive to impose' = 'It + adjective + infinitive'. 'Without + gerund': 'helping'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'to impose / to help' diyerek 'without' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'without' edat olarak gerund alır — 'helping' gerekli.

questions.question: The youth climate activists refuse ---- their protest, ---- that sustained pressure is the only way to achieve systemic change.

feedback.hint: 'Refuse + ...' yapısı. İkinci boşluk: görüşü sürdürme — eş zamanlı tutum.
feedback.logic: 'Refuse + infinitive': 'to abandon'. 'Maintaining that...' → eş zamanlı tutum participial phrase.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'abandoning' diyerek 'refuse' ardından gerund kullanır; 'refuse + infinitive' sabit yapıdır — 'to abandon' gerekli.

questions.question: There is little hope of ---- the declining biodiversity in urban areas without ---- both green corridors and public awareness campaigns.

feedback.hint: 'Hope of + ...' → edat tamlaması. 'Without + ...' → edat tamlaması.
feedback.logic: 'Hope of + gerund': 'reversing'. 'Without + gerund': 'establishing'. Her ikisi de edat tamlaması → gerund.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'reversing / to establish' diyerek 'without' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'without' edat olarak gerund alır — 'establishing' gerekli.

questions.question: The research institute, ---- annual report I referenced in my presentation, has just published a follow-up study ---- contradicts several of its earlier conclusions.

feedback.hint: İyelik: 'enstitünün raporu'. İkinci boşluk: 'study' için defining relative clause.
feedback.logic: 'Whose annual report' → iyelik. 'A follow-up study that contradicts' → defining subject: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'whose / which' diyerek 'which contradicts' kullanır; defining bağlamda 'that' daha standart — 'which' non-defining çağrışımı yaratabilir.

questions.question: The writer, from ---- short story collection this poem is taken, received the national literature prize last year.

feedback.hint: 'From ---- short story collection' → preposition + iyelik ilişkisi.
feedback.logic: 'From whose short story collection' → preposition + 'whose' (iyelik). Non-defining (virgüllü) → 'that' kullanılamaz.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'from whom' diyerek 'from whom short story collection' yapısını dener; bu dilbilgisel yanlış — iyelik için 'whose' gerekli.

questions.question: The generation ---- grew up with smartphones has developed communication habits ---- previous generations struggle to understand.

feedback.hint: İlk: nesil = kişi grubu → hangi pronoun? İkinci: 'habits' için defining relative clause, object.
feedback.logic: 'Generation' kişilerden oluşuyor → 'who'. 'Habits that previous generations struggle to understand' → defining, object → 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'that / that' diyerek her ikisi için de 'that' kullanır; 'generation' kolektif kişi anlamında 'who' daha doğal — 'that' da mümkün ama 'who' tercih edilir.

questions.question: The period ---- social media became truly ubiquitous was also the period ---- researchers began documenting its effects on adolescent self-esteem.

feedback.hint: 'The period' → zaman zarflığı. Her iki boşluk da aynı yapıda mı?
feedback.logic: 'The period when X' → zaman zarflığı: 'when'. Paralel yapı: 'the period when Y' → 'when'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'in which / in which' diyerek resmi ama ağır yapı kullanır; 'when' daha doğal ve tercih edilen — her ikisi dilbilgisel doğru ama 'when' akıcı.

questions.question: The city ---- I was born has changed almost beyond recognition; the neighbourhood ---- I spent most of my childhood no longer exists.

feedback.hint: Her iki boşluk da yer zarflığı bildiriyor. Paralel yapı.
feedback.logic: 'The city where I was born' + 'the neighbourhood where I spent' → her ikisi de zarflık 'where'.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'where / in which' diyerek farklı yapılar kullanır; paraleli korumak için her ikisi de 'where' olmalı — 'in which' dilbilgisel doğru ama paralellik bozulur.

questions.question: The scholarship committee is looking for candidates ---- academic excellence is matched by demonstrated commitment to community service.

feedback.hint: Aday özelliği: 'adayın akademik mükemmeliyeti' → iyelik.
feedback.logic: 'Candidates whose academic excellence is matched' → iyelik: 'whose'. Defining relative clause.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'who's' diyerek 'who is/has' kısaltmasını kullanır; iyelik sıfatı 'whose' gerekli — 'who's academic excellence' gramer hatası.

questions.question: There remains much ---- we do not understand about the long-term psychological impact of pandemic-era schooling, ---- is troubling given how widely it affected young people.

feedback.hint: 'Much that we do not understand' → defining. İkinci boşluk önceki tüm cümleye atıf → non-defining.
feedback.logic: 'Much that we do not understand' → defining after 'much'. İkinci boşluk: önceki tüm fikre atıf → non-defining → 'which'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'what / which' diyerek ilk boşluğa 'what' koyar; 'much what' yanlış — 'much that' doğru yapı.

questions.question: The only explanation ---- makes sense given all the available evidence is one ---- requires us to reconsider several long-held assumptions about the case.

feedback.hint: 'The only explanation' → defining. 'One that requires' → defining.
feedback.logic: 'The only explanation that makes sense' → 'only' + defining → 'that'. 'One that requires' → defining subject: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'that / which' diyerek 'one which requires' kullanır; defining bağlamda 'that' standart — 'which' non-defining çağrışımı taşır.

questions.question: ----ever argues that screen time has no effect on adolescent development must contend with the growing body of neuroimaging research ---- directly contradicts that claim.

feedback.hint: 'Whoever argues' → özne pozisyonunda serbest relative. 'Research that contradicts' → defining.
feedback.logic: 'Whoever argues' = 'the person who argues' → subject free relative → 'whoever'. 'Research that directly contradicts' → defining subject: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'Whomever' diyerek nesne halini kullanır; 'argues' fiilinin öznesi → özne hali 'whoever' gerekli.

questions.question: The platform has introduced several new features, the most controversial ---- is the auto-play function, ---- many parents argue exposes young viewers to inappropriate content.

feedback.hint: 'The most controversial of which' → partitive yapı. İkinci boşluk: 'function' için non-defining.
feedback.logic: 'The most controversial of which is the auto-play function' → partitive: 'of which'. 'The auto-play function, which many parents argue' → non-defining: 'which'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'of which / that' diyerek ikinci boşluğa 'that' koyar; virgüllü non-defining bağlamda 'that' kullanılamaz — 'which' zorunlu.

questions.question: ---- evidence that chronic stress impairs ---- memory consolidation is now ---- strong that many educators are reconsidering ---- amount of pressure placed on students.

feedback.hint: 'Evidence that' → sıfat tamlaması. 'Memory consolidation' → genel. 'So strong' → 'so + adj'. 'The amount' → belirli.
feedback.logic: 'The evidence that' → sıfat tamlamasıyla belirlenmiş → 'the'. 'Memory consolidation' → genel → article yok. 'So strong that' → 'so + adj + that'. 'The amount of pressure' → belirli → 'the'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'such' diyerek 'such strong' kullanır; 'evidence is strong' → sıfat + 'so' yapısı, 'such' isim öbeği gerektirir.

questions.question: ---- dropout rate among first-year university students has become ---- pressing concern, particularly for institutions in ---- regions with limited educational infrastructure.

feedback.hint: 'The dropout rate among' → belirli. 'A pressing concern' → ilk kez. 'Regions with limited' → genel çoğul.
feedback.logic: 'The dropout rate among first-year students' → belirli → 'the'. 'A pressing concern' → belirsiz tekil → 'a'. 'Regions with limited infrastructure' → genel çoğul → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'the regions' diyerek belirli bölgelere işaret eder; genel anlamdaki bölgeler → article yok.

questions.question: ---- most striking aspect of her performance was ---- way she conveyed ---- vulnerability without ---- excessive sentimentality.

feedback.hint: 'The most striking aspect' → superlative. 'The way she conveyed' → belirli. 'Vulnerability / sentimentality' → soyut kavramlar.
feedback.logic: 'The most striking aspect' → superlative → 'the'. 'The way she conveyed' → sıfat tamlamasıyla belirlenmiş → 'the'. 'Vulnerability / sentimentality' → soyut genel → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'the vulnerability' diyerek soyut genel kavrama 'the' koyar; genel soyut kavramlar article almaz.

questions.question: ---- athlete who wins ---- gold medal at such ---- young age inevitably faces ---- enormous pressure to repeat the achievement.

feedback.hint: 'An athlete who wins' → genel, ilk kez. 'A gold medal' → belirsiz. 'Such a young age' → sabit deyim. 'An enormous pressure' → 'e' ünlü.
feedback.logic: 'An athlete' → genel, 'a' ile başlıyor → 'an'. 'A gold medal' → belirsiz tekil. 'Such a young age' → sabit ifade. 'An enormous pressure' → 'e' ünlü → 'an'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'the athlete / the gold medal' diyerek önceden bahsedilmiş gibi işaret eder; cümle genel bir hipotez kuruyor — belirsiz gerekli.

questions.question: ---- both of her parents ---- doctors, she grew up with ---- deep respect for ---- science that shaped her eventual career choice.

feedback.hint: 'With both parents being' → absolute clause. 'A deep respect' → ilk kez. 'The science' → belirli mi?
feedback.logic: 'With both of her parents being doctors' → absolute clause. 'A deep respect' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'The science that shaped her career' → sıfat tamlamasıyla belirlenmiş → 'the'.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'a / -' diyerek son boşluğu article'siz bırakır; 'the science that shaped her career' sıfat tamlamasıyla belirlenmiş → 'the' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- persistence required to master ---- complex skill like coding is ---- quality that cannot easily ---- taught in ---- conventional classroom.
options: A) The / a / a / be / a
C) The / a / the / be / a
D) A / a / a / be / a
E) The / a / a / be / the

feedback.hint: 'The persistence required to...' → sıfat tamlaması. 'A complex skill' → ilk kez. 'A quality' → ilk kez. 'A conventional classroom' → genel belirsiz.
feedback.logic: 'The persistence required' → belirlenmiş → 'the'. 'A complex skill' → ilk kez → 'a'. 'A quality that' → ilk kez → 'a'. 'Be taught' → pasif. 'A conventional classroom' → belirsiz → 'a'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'the quality' diyerek önceden bahsedilmiş gibi işaret eder; bu nitelik ilk kez belirleniyor — 'a quality' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- few of the participants had expected ---- such ---- outcome, and ---- surprise on their faces was immediately evident.

feedback.hint: 'A few of the participants' → belirsiz az sayıda. 'Such an outcome' → 'such + a/an'. 'The surprise on their faces' → belirli.
feedback.logic: 'A few of the participants' → belirsiz az sayıda → 'a'. 'Such an outcome' → 'o' ünlü → 'an'. 'The surprise on their faces' → sıfat tamlamasıyla belirlenmiş → 'the'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'such' diyerek üçüncü boşluğa 'such' koyar ve 'a few / - / such / the' yapısını oluşturur; 'such an outcome' standart yapıdır — 'such' ve 'an' ayrı ayrı gerekli.

questions.question: ---- passion for storytelling she developed during her childhood has proven to be ---- most valuable asset in ---- career that now spans three continents.

feedback.hint: 'The passion she developed' → sıfat tamlaması. 'The most valuable asset' → superlative. 'A career that now spans' → ilk kez.
feedback.logic: 'The passion she developed' → sıfat tamlaması → 'the'. 'The most valuable asset' → superlative → 'the'. 'A career that spans' → ilk kez → 'a'.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'her / a' diyerek ortadaki boşluğa iyelik sıfatı ve 'a' koyar; 'the most valuable' superlative zorunlu olarak 'the' alır — 'her most valuable' da mümkün ama C daha standart sınav tercihi.

questions.question: ---- number of languages spoken natively is declining at ---- alarming rate; ---- linguist estimates that ---- unique language disappears every fortnight.

feedback.hint: 'The number of' → belirli. 'An alarming rate' → ünlü harf. 'A linguist' → belirsiz. 'A unique language' → belirsiz.
feedback.logic: 'The number of languages' → belirli → 'the'. 'An alarming rate' → 'a' ünlü → 'an'. 'A linguist estimates' → belirsiz tekil → 'a'. 'A unique language' → 'u' ünlü... bekle: 'unique' /juːnɪk/ → /j/ ünsüz → 'a unique'. 'A unique language' → 'a'.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'one / a' diyerek üçüncü boşluğa 'one' koyar; 'one linguist estimates' gramer açısından mümkün ama stilistik — 'a linguist' daha standart sınav tercihi.

questions.question: ---- integrity of ---- scientific research depends not only on ---- accuracy of its data but also on ---- transparency of the process by which conclusions are drawn.

feedback.hint: 'The integrity of' → belirli kavram. 'Scientific research' → genel. 'The accuracy of its data' → belirli. 'The transparency of the process' → belirli.
feedback.logic: 'The integrity of scientific research' → 'integrity' of ile belirlenmiş → 'the'; 'scientific research' genel → article yok. 'The accuracy of its data' → belirli → 'the'. 'The transparency of the process' → belirli → 'the'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'the / the / the / the' diyerek tüm boşluklara 'the' koyar; 'scientific research' genel kavram → article yok.

questions.question: ---- all the resources available to modern students, critical thinking skills appear to be declining, ---- that passive consumption of information has replaced active engagement.
options: E) In spite of / that suggests

feedback.hint: 'All the resources' → isim öbeği. İkinci boşluk: eleştirel düşüncenin düşüşünün sonuç bildirimi — participial phrase.
feedback.logic: 'Despite + noun phrase': 'despite all the resources'. 'Suggesting that' → eş zamanlı sonucu bildiren present participial phrase.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'Although' diyerek tam cümle bağlacı kullanır; ardından 'all the resources available' geldiğinde özne + fiil olmadan cümle eksik — 'despite' isim öbeğiyle uyumlu.

questions.question: The young director's debut film was ---- commercially successful ---- critically acclaimed; ---- it has already secured distribution deals in fifteen countries.
options: C) not only / but also / consequently

feedback.hint: 'Both... and' → iki olumlu özellik paralel. Noktalı virgül + ek bilgi bildirimi.
feedback.logic: 'Both commercially successful and critically acclaimed' → eşleştirici bağlaç. 'Moreover it has secured deals' → ek bilgi bildirimi — 'moreover' ('indeed' de mümkün ama 'moreover' ek bilgiyi daha güçlü vurgular).
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'indeed' diyerek vurgu zarfı kullanır; 'indeed' içeriği pekiştirir ama 'moreover' yeni ek bilgi bildirir — dağıtım anlaşmaları yeni bir bilgi.

questions.question: ----  the argument seemed compelling at first glance, closer examination revealed ---- its core assumptions were fundamentally flawed.

feedback.hint: İlk boşluk: kısmi kabul zıtlık bağlacı + tam cümle. İkinci boşluk: 'revealed' ardından noun clause.
feedback.logic: 'While it seemed compelling' → kısmi zıtlık bağlacı + tam cümle. 'Revealed that' → olgusal noun clause bağlacı.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'Despite' diyerek edat kullanır; 'the argument seemed compelling at first glance' tam cümle — 'despite' isim öbeği alır, tam cümle almaz.

questions.question: She studied architecture ---- engineering, ---- drawn to the intersection of the two disciplines ---- believed a hybrid approach would be most innovative.
options: A) as well as / having been / as she
B) and / because she was / which
D) as well as / having been / as if she
E) in addition to / drawn / because she

feedback.hint: 'As well as' → paralel isim öbeği. 'Having been drawn' → geçmişteki durum participial. 'As she believed' → neden bağlacı.
feedback.logic: 'As well as engineering' → 'as well as + noun'. 'Having been drawn to the intersection' → perfect passive participial (önceden var olan çekim). 'As she believed' → neden bağlacı.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'as if she' diyerek şüpheli karşılaştırma kurar; 'as if' gerçek olmayan bir benzetme yapar — burada gerçek bir inanç söz konusu, 'as she believed' doğru.

questions.question: The proposal was innovative; ----, it failed to address ---- the financial constraints ---- the logistical challenges that would inevitably arise.

feedback.hint: Noktalı virgül + zıtlık. 'Failed to address' → olumsuz → 'neither... nor' mı 'either... or' mı?
feedback.logic: 'However' → zıtlık. 'Failed to address either X or Y' → olumsuz bağlam + 'either... or' (olumsuz fiil + either... or) veya 'neither... nor'. 'However / neither... nor' = 'failed to address neither... nor' (double negative riski). 'However / either... or' = 'failed to address either X or Y' = doğru.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'nonetheless / neither / nor' diyerek 'nonetheless' + 'neither... nor' kullanır; 'failed to address neither... nor' double negative oluşturur — 'either... or' tek olumsuzla kullanılır. D şıkkı 'however / neither / nor' diyerek: 'failed to address neither X nor Y' de aslında kabul edilebilir ama 'either... or' ile negative context daha standart.

questions.question: The seminar ---- informative ---- it fundamentally challenged how participants thought about urban design; ---- it prompted several architects to rethink their entire approach.

feedback.hint: 'So + adj + that' yapısı veya 'proved so'. Noktalı virgül + 'bu bile yetmez, dahası' → hangi geçiş?
feedback.logic: 'Proved so informative that' → 'so + adjective + that'. 'Indeed' → vurgulama/pekiştirme zarfı — önceki iddianın doğrulanması.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'consequently' diyerek mantıksal sonuç bildirir; 'several architects rethought' sonuç gibi görünse de 'indeed' pekiştirme olarak daha güçlü bu bağlamda.

questions.question: ---- the financial investment required, the school board unanimously approved the renovation, ---- demonstrating its commitment to improving the learning environment.

feedback.hint: İlk boşluk: yatırımın büyüklüğünü kabul eden participial. İkinci boşluk: eylemin sonuç bildirimi.
feedback.logic: 'Acknowledging the financial investment required' → concessive participial phrase. 'Thereby demonstrating' → sonuç bildiren participial phrase.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'thus' diyerek 'thus demonstrating' kullanır; 'thus' ve 'thereby' her ikisi de sonuç bildirir ama 'thereby + gerund' daha güçlü deyimsel yapıdır.

questions.question: The new policy addresses climate targets; ---- it fails to account for the social inequalities ---- its implementation will inevitably create.

feedback.hint: Noktalı virgül + zıtlık bağlacı. 'Inequalities' için defining relative clause.
feedback.logic: 'Yet' → zıtlık bağlacı (noktalı virgül sonrası). 'Inequalities that its implementation will create' → defining object relative: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'yet / which' diyerek defining bağlamda 'which' kullanır; defining relative clause'da 'that' daha standart — 'which' non-defining çağrışımı taşır.

questions.question: ---- she initially resisted the idea of performing on stage, she eventually agreed, ---- surprising her drama teacher, who had long believed in her hidden potential.

feedback.hint: 'In doing so' → bu eylemi yaparak → nasıl bir anlam? 'Thereby' ile fark nedir?
feedback.logic: 'Although she initially resisted' → tam cümle zıtlık bağlacı. 'In doing so, surprising her teacher' → 'in doing so' = bu eylemi gerçekleştirmesi yoluyla (daha nüanslı, spesifik eyleme atıf).
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'thereby' diyerek doğrudan sonuç bildirir; 'in doing so' ise 'this specific act' vurgusu yapar — öğretmenin şaşırması sürpriz ve spesifik bağlamda 'in doing so' daha güçlü.

questions.question: The conference brought together experts from ---- education ---- public health, ---- underlying the growing consensus that student well-being cannot be addressed in isolation.
options: C) not only / but also / therefore

feedback.hint: 'Both... and' → iki alan. 'Thereby + gerund' → eylemin sonucu.
feedback.logic: 'Both education and public health' → eşleştirici bağlaç. 'Thereby underlining the consensus' → eylemin mantıksal sonucu participial phrase.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'not only... but also / therefore' diyerek 'therefore' kullanır; 'underlining' gerundial phrase tam cümle değil — 'therefore' tam cümle başlatır, 'thereby' participial phrase ile uyumlu.
